title: Rockstar
tmdbOverview: College student Janardhan is a simpleton who desperately seeks inspiration for the musician inside him. Although heartbreak helps him reach his goal, it also leads him to self-destruction.
synopsis: Rockstar (2011) is a drama, music and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 12 certification (IE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
